highlights.text: Built and maintained a customer-facing landing page reaching users across 90+ countries, with bilingual localization, scroll-based animations, and Google Analytics integration.
Developed an ERP sales dashboard used daily by ~15–20 sales reps, covering end-to-end sales workflows from lead tracking to order management, integrated with multiple REST APIs.
Integrated WhatsApp into internal systems, centralizing 100+ customer conversations and reducing communication fragmentation across channels.
